title: Database corruption following INSERT with a TRIGGER that does an affinity change
poc: CREATE TABLE t2(tt TEXT PRIMARY KEY, ss);

CREATE TRIGGER t1_ai AFTER INSERT ON t1 BEGIN
  INSERT INTO t2(tt) VALUES(new.ii);

CREATE TRIGGER t2_ai AFTER INSERT ON t2 BEGIN
  UPDATE t2 SET ss = 4;
key_bug_features: INSERT with nested triggers converting TEXT to INTEGER
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE fuzz_sqlite_t2(tt TEXT PRIMARY KEY, ss);
CREATE TRIGGER fuzz_sqlite_t1_ai AFTER INSERT ON fuzz_sqlite_t1 BEGIN INSERT INTO fuzz_sqlite_t2(tt) VALUES(new.ii); END;
CREATE TRIGGER fuzz_sqlite_t2_ai AFTER INSERT ON fuzz_sqlite_t2 BEGIN UPDATE fuzz_sqlite_t2 SET ss = 4; END;
